es.description: Las cloraminas aparecen cuando el cloro se combina con suciedad.

procedure.title: Medir valores iniciales
procedure.explication: Mide pH, cloro libre y total antes de añadir productos.

procedure.title: Añadir cloro shock
procedure.explication: Añade 10 veces el valor de cloraminas (por la noche).

procedure.title: Filtrar
procedure.explication: Filtra 24h continuas tras añadir el cloro.

procedure.title: Limpiar filtro
procedure.explication: Arena/vidrio: BACKWASH 2-3 min hasta agua transparente + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartucho: limpiar con manguera.

procedure.title: Medición de control
procedure.explication: Mide nuevamente tras 8–24h. Una vez cloro <3 ppm, ya se puede bañar.

en.description: Chloramines appear when chlorine combines with dirt.

procedure.title: Measure initial values
procedure.explication: Measure pH, free chlorine, and total chlorine before adding products.

procedure.title: Calculate chloramines
procedure.explication: Subtract free chlorine from total chlorine.

procedure.title: Add shock chlorine
procedure.explication: Add 10 times the chloramine value (at night).

procedure.title: Filter
procedure.explication: Filter continuously for 24 hours after adding chlorine.

procedure.title: Clean filter
procedure.explication: Sand/Glass: BACKWASH 2-3 min until water is clear + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartridge: clean with hose.

procedure.title: Control measurement
procedure.explication: Measure again after 8–24 hours. Once chlorine <3 ppm, pool is safe to swim.

procedure.title: Medir valores iniciales
procedure.explication: Medir pH y cloro antes de actuar.

procedure.title: Cepillado
procedure.explication: Cepillar paredes y suelo para soltar las algas.

procedure.title: Limpiar filtro
procedure.explication: Arena/vidrio: BACKWASH 2-3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartucho: limpiar con manguera.

procedure.title: Medición de control
procedure.explication: Volver a medir valores de pH y cloro.

procedure.title: Measure initial values
procedure.explication: Measure pH and chlorine before taking action.

procedure.title: Brushing
procedure.explication: Brush walls and floor to loosen algae.

procedure.title: Clean filter
procedure.explication: Sand/Glass: BACKWASH 2-3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartridge: hose clean.

procedure.title: Limpieza del filtro durante el proceso
procedure.explication: Limpiar filtro cada 12-24h. Arena/vidrio: BACKWASH 2-3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartucho: limpiar con manguera.

procedure.title: Reposar y aspirar
procedure.explication: Dejar reposar y luego aspirar a desagüe.

procedure.title: Clean filter during process
procedure.explication: Clean filter every 12–24h. Sand/Glass: BACKWASH 2–3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartridge: hose clean.

procedure.title: Add flocculant
procedure.explication: Add flocculant if water remains cloudy.

procedure.title: Rest and vacuum
procedure.explication: Let it rest, then vacuum to drain.

procedure.title: Cepillado intensivo
procedure.explication: Cepillado intensivo en toda la piscina.

procedure.title: Limpieza continua del filtro
procedure.explication: Arena/vidrio: BACKWASH 2-3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartucho: limpiar con manguera varias veces durante la filtración.

procedure.title: Aspirado a desagüe
procedure.explication: Aspirar suciedad a desagüe (no al filtro).

procedure.title: Continuous filter cleaning
procedure.explication: Sand/Glass: BACKWASH 2–3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartridge: hose clean several times during filtration.

procedure.title: Limpieza inicial del filtro
procedure.explication: Limpiar filtro antes de empezar. Arena/vidrio: BACKWASH 2-3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartucho: limpiar con manguera.

procedure.title: Cepillado
procedure.explication: Cepillar si hay partículas en paredes.

procedure.title: Limpieza del filtro
procedure.explication: Volver a limpiar filtro tras filtración. Arena/vidrio: BACKWASH 2-3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartucho: limpiar con manguera.

procedure.title: Initial filter cleaning
procedure.explication: Clean filter before starting. Sand/Glass: BACKWASH 2–3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartridge: hose clean.

procedure.title: Brushing
procedure.explication: Brush if particles remain on walls.

procedure.title: Filter cleaning
procedure.explication: Clean filter again after filtering. Sand/Glass: BACKWASH 2–3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartridge: hose clean.

procedure.title: Add flocculant
procedure.explication: Add flocculant if water does not improve.

procedure.title: Limpiar filtro
procedure.explication: Limpiar filtro para eliminar residuos. Arena/vidrio: BACKWASH 2–3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartucho: limpiar con manguera.

procedure.title: Clean filter
procedure.explication: Clean filter to remove residues. Sand/Glass: BACKWASH 2–3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartridge: hose clean.

procedure.title: Revisión del filtro
procedure.explication: Limpiar filtro si ha habido mucha suciedad. Arena/vidrio: BACKWASH 2–3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartucho: limpiar con manguera.

procedure.title: Filter review
procedure.explication: Clean filter if very dirty. Sand/Glass: BACKWASH 2–3 min + RINSE 30s–2min. Cartridge: hose clean.
